title: London police turning to AI to draft reports from body camera footage
description: Officers to review AI-generated drafts as tool rolls out in coming months.

title: NYC parents tell Mayor Mamdani: ‘Slow your horses’ on AI in the classroom
description: NEW YORK — New York parents and advocates descended on City Hall Thursday to plead with Mayor Zohran Mamdani to break with his schools chancellor and impose a two-year moratorium on artificial intelligence in the classroom.
